title: TPL tooling config
description: Reference data consumed by tpl:* commands. Looked up as tpl.config.json at the directory where the commands are invoked, or passed explicitly via --config (so a shared file such as adr.config.json can be reused).

idFormat.description: TPL id / filename convention. `date-sequence` expects `TPL-YYYYMMDD-NN-<slug>.md` (id `TPL-YYYYMMDD-NN`); `issue-number` expects `TPL-<n>-<slug>.md` (id `TPL-<n>`, no zero padding).

topics.description: Controlled vocabulary for a TPL's `topic` field. Empty or omitted disables topic validation.
